basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Associate Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati has released the official notification for 1 Associate Project Scientist posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in allied Health Science (Physiotherapy/ occupational therapy/ prosthetics & orthotics) with minimum 3 years of work experience in the development of biomedical devices
qualification.details: Master's degree in allied Health Science (Physiotherapy/ occupational therapy/ prosthetics & orthotics) with minimum 3 years of work experience in the development of biomedical devices.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Associate Project Scientist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati Associate Project Scientist Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Associate Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Associate Project Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Associate Project Scientist position at IIT Guwahati is 22nd July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Associate Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Associate Project Scientist role, candidates must possess a Master's degree in allied Health Science, specifically in Physiotherapy, Occupational Therapy, or Prosthetics & Orthotics. Additionally, a minimum of 3 years of work experience in biomedical device development is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Associate Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Associate Project Scientist position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 42,000. This salary is commensurate with the experience and qualifications required for the role.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Associate Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Associate Project Scientist post in the Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati recruitment drive. This is a single opening, so interested candidates should ensure they meet all the criteria.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Guwahati Associate Project Scientist recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms and required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without incurring any charges, making the application process more accessible.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Associate Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Associate Project Scientist position at IIT Guwahati primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience, and then invited for an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Associate Project Scientist position at IIT Guwahati is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure, as specified in the official notification and employment contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam. The recruitment is for a position within this institute, and candidates applying should be willing to work in this location.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Associate Project Scientist at IIT Guwahati is IITG/II&SI/Project Staff Rectt-2026/128. This number should be used for reference when inquiring about the recruitment.
